exported_functions.name: Evaluate
exported_functions.signature: func Evaluate(candidate model.Candidate, threshold float64, requiredEvidence []rules.EvidenceRequirement) (model.Candidate, Outcome, error)
exported_functions.notes: Returns error if threshold out of [0,1], candidate.Validate() fails, or any requirement.Validate() fails. Returns a copy of candidate with State updated — does not mutate input. Does NOT append RejectionReasons; the engine owns that.

internal_functions.name: satisfiesRequirements
internal_functions.notes: Iterates requirements; for each, counts evidence atoms that satisfy all selectors. Returns false if any requirement count < MinCount.

internal_functions.name: matchesRequirement
internal_functions.notes: ALL selectors in requirement.MatchAll must match for atom to count.

internal_functions.name: evidenceFieldValue
internal_functions.notes: Dispatches on EvidenceField constant; returns empty string for unknown field (does not error).

notes: threshold must be in [0,1]; out-of-range returns error.
Empty requiredEvidence slice always yields MeetsStructure = true.
Returned candidate is a copy; State is updated but RejectionReasons are NOT modified here.
Selector matching is exact string comparison — whitespace, case, and prefix differences are not normalized.
CandidateStateAdmitted is set only when BOTH MeetsConfidence and MeetsStructure are true.
